title: pinthoz/attention-atlas
summary: 该仓库包含用于解释性大型语言模型（LLM）的注意力机制可视化工具，用于探索注意力模式、评估偏差和验证可解释性。核心技术包括注意力机制模型、可视化工具和评估方法，适用于LLM研究和应用。，基于模型推理的架构
description: This repository hosts the code, experiments, and prototype developed for my Master’s thesis: Interpretable Large Language Models through Attention Mechanism Visualization. It provides tools for exploring attention patterns, assessing bias, and validating interpretability in LLMs.
